  1. com.blackrook.gloop.glfw

com.blackrook.gloop.glfw

Package
Description
com.blackrook.gloop.glfw
Contains root classes.
  • Classes in com.blackrook.gloop.glfw used by com.blackrook.gloop.glfw
    Class
    Description
    GLFWContext.MainLoop
    Main GLFW looper.
    GLFWCursor
    A GLFW cursor instance.
    GLFWHandle
    Generic GLFW handle type.
    GLFWInputSystem
    An input event filtering system, meant to be used as a "one-stop" management class.
    GLFWInputSystem.JoystickConnectionListener
    A listener interface for when joysticks/gamepads get connected or disconnected from GLFW.
    GLFWInputSystem.JoystickInputParameters
    Joystick input parameters per added device.
    GLFWMonitor
    A GLFW monitor information instance.
    GLFWWindow
    A GLFW window instance.
    GLFWWindow.CursorMode
    Enum of window cursor modes.
    GLFWWindow.Dimension
    A dimension.
    GLFWWindow.DropListener
    A drag 'n drop event listener interface.
    GLFWWindow.InputListener
    An input event listener interface.
    GLFWWindow.Point
    A single point.
    GLFWWindow.PointF
    A single point, floating-point.
    GLFWWindow.Rectangle
    A rectangle bound.
    GLFWWindow.State
    Window characteristic state that can be fetched outside of the main thread.
    GLFWWindow.WindowListener
    A window event listener interface.
    GLFWWindowHints
    Windows hints for the next window created.
    GLFWWindowHints.ClientAPI
     
    GLFWWindowHints.ContextCreationAPI
     
    GLFWWindowHints.ContextReleaseBehavior
     
    GLFWWindowHints.ContextRobustness
     
    GLFWWindowHints.OpenGLProfile
